info.title: OpcUaNodesetExporter
info.description: A .NET global tool that connects to an OPC UA server and exports all custom namespaces into separate NodeSet2 XML files.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Exports OPC UA server namespaces to NodeSet2 XML files.

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: OPC UA server endpoint URL (e.g., opc.tcp://localhost:4840)

options.name: --security-mode
options.description: Security mode: None, Sign, SignAndEncrypt [default: None]

options.name: --security-policy
options.description: Security policy: None, Basic256Sha256, Aes128_Sha256_RsaOaep, Aes256_Sha256_RsaPss [default: None]

options.name: --auth-mode
options.description: Authentication mode: Anonymous, UserName, Certificate [default: Anonymous]

options.name: --password-from-stdin
options.description: Read password from stdin (for piping) [default: False]

options.name: --certificate-path
options.description: Path to client X.509 certificate (PFX format)

options.name: --certificate-from-stdin
options.description: Read certificate (base64 PFX) from stdin [default: False]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for NodeSet2 XML files [default: ./output]

options.name: --retry-count
options.description: Number of reconnection attempts on disconnect [default: 3]
